title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, King Harald, Loki as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's goin' after the marines?! isn't it on their side?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Scratch that!!! Looks like it has it out for all of us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey, get a hold of yourselves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What are you babbling about, dummy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Carry the treasure and get out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not this again... you... just don't do anything crazy. Okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: What the hell is that freaking monster?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No idea... Saint Saturn just Trans- Formed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of the five elders, huh... this is my first time seeing one.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a fitting look for the head of those maggots.

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
